AddIpAddressToIpGroup.ipSetId: The ID of the IP address group
AddIpAddressToIpGroup.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
AddIpAddressToIpGroup.ipAddressInfo: IP address entries to add. The ipVersion must match the specified IP address group. A maximum of 10 entries can be specified per request
AddIpAddressToIpGroup.ipAddressInfo.ipAddress: IP address in the parameter template, either a specific IP address or a CIDR block
AddIpAddressToIpGroup.ipAddressInfo.description: Description of the IP address entry in the parameter template
